meta.label: Tableau Hyper format
meta.description: Export datasets to Tableau .hyper format. ⚠️ Starting from 1.0.0, DSS geometry columns are now exported as Geography.
meta.author: Dataiku (Thibault DESFONTAINES)

params.name: export_geometry_as_string
params.label: Export DSS geometries as string
params.description: Select whether to export the geometry format as string. By default, geometries are exported as geography.
